casepack.title: Information Theory Demonstration Stub
casepack.description: Minimal Tier-1 demonstration unit for the information_theory domain (uses universal UMA contract pending a dedicated INFO contract). Full closure code lives in closures/information_theory/; this casepack is a placeholder.

run_intent.notes: Stub demonstration unit for the information_theory domain. Three uniform channels at c=0.99 yield a Stable regime under canon thresholds. Pending replacement with domain-specific raw measurements drawn from the closure code in closures/information_theory/.
